@startuml
actor User
participant LoginInterface
participant AuthService
participant UserDatabase

User -> LoginInterface : enterCredentials()
LoginInterface -> AuthService : authenticate(credentials)
AuthService -> UserDatabase : loadUserRecord()
UserDatabase --> AuthService : userRecord
AuthService -> AuthService : verifyPasswordHash()
AuthService --> LoginInterface : accessToken
LoginInterface --> User : loginSuccess()
@enduml

sequenceDiagram(name = "LoginFlow") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val ui = lifeline(name = "LoginInterface")
    val auth = lifeline(name = "AuthenticationService")
    val db = lifeline(name = "UserDatabase")
    message(from = user, to = ui, label = "enterCredentials()")
    message(from = ui, to = auth, label = "verifyCredentials()")
    message(from = auth, to = db, label = "loadUserRecord()")
    reply(from = db, to = auth, label = "userRecord")
    message(from = auth, to = auth, label = "verifyPasswordHash()")
    reply(from = auth, to = ui, label = "accessToken")
    reply(from = ui, to = user, label = "loginSuccess")
}

@startuml
actor Buyer
participant WebShop
participant SearchService
participant ProductCatalog

Buyer -> WebShop : enterSearchTerm()
WebShop -> SearchService : search(term)
SearchService -> ProductCatalog : findProducts(term)
ProductCatalog --> SearchService : products
SearchService --> WebShop : results

alt results found
    WebShop -> ProductCatalog : loadImages(productIds)
    ProductCatalog --> WebShop : images
end

WebShop --> Buyer : resultsPage
@enduml

@startuml
actor Customer
participant Shop
participant CheckoutService
participant PaymentGateway
participant Database

Customer -> Shop : initiateCheckout()
Shop -> CheckoutService : processCheckout()
CheckoutService -> PaymentGateway : verifyPaymentDetails()
PaymentGateway --> CheckoutService : verificationResult

alt verification successful
    CheckoutService -> Database : saveOrder()
    Database --> CheckoutService : orderSaved
    CheckoutService -> PaymentGateway : processPayment()
    PaymentGateway --> CheckoutService : paymentResult
    CheckoutService --> Shop : success
else verification failed
    CheckoutService --> Shop : errorMessage
end

Shop --> Customer : displayResult
@enduml

@startuml
actor Client
participant "API Gateway" as Gateway
participant "Rate Limiter" as RateLimiter
participant "Backend Service" as Backend

loop up to 3 times
Client -> Gateway : requestData()
Gateway -> RateLimiter : checkQuota()
alt quota available
RateLimiter --> Gateway : quotaOK
Gateway -> Backend : fetchData()
Backend --> Gateway : data
Gateway --> Client : data
else quota exhausted
RateLimiter --> Gateway : quotaExceeded
Gateway --> Client : 429 TooManyRequests
Client -> Client : wait(backoff)
end
end
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Client
  participant Gateway
  participant RateLimiter
  participant Backend

  loop up to 3 retries
    Client->>Gateway: requestData()
    Gateway->>RateLimiter: checkQuota()
    alt quota available
      RateLimiter-->>Gateway: quotaOk
      Gateway->>Backend: fetchData()
      Backend-->>Gateway: data
      Gateway-->>Client: data
    else quota exhausted
      RateLimiter-->>Gateway: quotaExceeded
      Gateway-->>Client: 429 TooManyRequests
      Client->>Client: waitBackoff()
    end
  end

    val backend = lifeline(name = "BackendService")

    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaExhausted")
    reply(from = gateway, to = client, label = "429 Too Many Requests")
    message(from = client, to = client, label = "wait(backoff)")

    message(from = client, to = gateway, label = "requestData() [attempt 2]")
    message(from = gateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "checkQuota(client)")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaExhausted")
    reply(from = gateway, to = client, label = "429 Too Many Requests")
    message(from = client, to = client, label = "wait(backoff)")

    message(from = client, to = gateway, label = "requestData() [attempt 3]")
    message(from = gateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "checkQuota(client)")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaAvailable")
    message(from = gateway, to = backend, label = "fetchData()")
    reply(from = backend, to = gateway, label = "data")
    reply(from = gateway, to = client, label = "data")
}

WebPortal --> User : neutralNotification

    Auth --> Gateway : validationResult

    Cache --> Gateway : ack

else token invalid

@startuml
actor Customer
participant OrderService
participant SagaOrchestrator
participant WarehouseService
participant PaymentService
participant ShipmentService
participant EventLog

Customer -> OrderService : placeOrder()
OrderService -> SagaOrchestrator : instantiate()
SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("sagaStarted")

SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : reserveItems()
WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : reservationResult
SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("reservationChecked")

alt items available
    SagaOrchestrator -> PaymentService : executePayment()
    PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentResult
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("paymentAttempted")

    alt payment successful
        SagaOrchestrator -> ShipmentService : commissionShipment()
        ShipmentService --> SagaOrchestrator : shipmentResult
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("shipmentCommissioned")
    else payment failed
        SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : cancelReservation()
        WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : cancellationResult
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("compensationExecuted")
    end
else items not available
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("transactionAborted")
end

SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : teardown()
OrderService --> Customer : orderStatus
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Customer
  participant OrderService
  participant SagaOrchestrator
  participant EventLog
  participant WarehouseService
  participant PaymentService
  participant ShipmentService

  Customer->>OrderService: placeOrder()
  OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: instantiate()
  SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: orchestratorReady

  par log reservation step
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(reserveItems)
  and reserve items
    SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: reserveItems()
  end
  WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: reservationResult

  alt goods available
    par log payment step
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(executePayment)
    and execute payment
      SagaOrchestrator->>PaymentService: executePayment()
    end
    PaymentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: paymentResult

    alt payment successful
      par log shipment step
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(commissionShipment)
      and commission shipment
        SagaOrchestrator->>ShipmentService: commissionShipment()
      end
      ShipmentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: shipmentConfirmed
    else payment failed
      par log compensation step
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(cancelReservation)
      and cancel reservation
        SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: cancelReservation()
      end
      WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: reservationCancelled
    end
  else goods not available
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(abortTransaction)
  end

  SagaOrchestrator->>OrderService: teardown()
  OrderService-->>Customer: orderStatus

@startuml
actor User
participant Client
participant AuthServer
participant SessionStore
participant AuditLog
participant ResourceServer

User -> Client : login()
Client -> AuthServer : redirectToAuthorize()
AuthServer -> SessionStore : createSession()
SessionStore --> AuthServer : sessionId
AuthServer --> User : loginForm

User -> AuthServer : submitCredentials()

alt credentials valid
    AuthServer --> User : redirectWithAuthCode()
    User -> Client : callback(code)
    Client -> AuthServer : exchangeCodeForToken()
    AuthServer --> Client : accessToken
    AuthServer -> AuditLog : logTokenIssuance()

    alt scope includes profile
        Client -> ResourceServer : getUserData(accessToken)
        ResourceServer -> AuthServer : verifyToken()
        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : tokenValid
        ResourceServer --> Client : userData
    end

else credentials invalid
    AuthServer -> SessionStore : discardSession()
    SessionStore --> AuthServer : ack
    AuthServer --> User : errorMessage
end

@startuml
actor Driver
participant Camera
participant Radar
participant FusionUnit
participant EmergencyBrakingAssistant
participant ControlUnit
participant DiagnosticLog

Camera -> FusionUnit : cameraData()
Radar -> FusionUnit : radarData()

FusionUnit -> FusionUnit : computeEnvironmentModel()

FusionUnit -> EmergencyBrakingAssistant : collisionRisk(timeToCollision)

alt timeToCollision < criticalThreshold
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> Driver : acousticWarning()
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> ControlUnit : initiateBraking()
    loop until vehicle stationary
        EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> ControlUnit : adjustBrakePressure()
        ControlUnit --> EmergencyBrakingAssistant : brakeStatus()
    end
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> ControlUnit : endBrakingManeuver()
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> DiagnosticLog : logEvent()
else timeToCollision >= criticalThreshold
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> Driver : distanceWarning()
    EmergencyBrakingAssistant -> DiagnosticLog : logRisk()
end
@enduml

environment model FusionUnit->>Assistant: reportCollisionRisk(ttc) alt ttc below critical threshold Assistant->>Driver: acousticWarning() Assistant->>ControlUnit: initiateBraking() loop until vehicle stationary Assistant->>ControlUnit: adjustBrakePressure() ControlUnit-->>Assistant: brakeStatus end Assistant->>ControlUnit: endManeuver() Assistant->>DiagnosticLog: recordEvent() else ttc above threshold opt show distance warning Assistant->>Driver: distanceWarning() end Assistant->>DiagnosticLog: logRisk() end

    val osService = partDef(name = "OS Service")

    // BSW Layer composed of BSW modules
    val bswLayer = partDef(name = "BSW Layer") {

        part(name = "ethernetStack", typeId = ethernetStack.id)
        part(name = "osService", typeId = osService.id)
        part(name = "watchdogService", typeId = watchdogService.id)
    }

    // Application layer components and VFB
    val vfb = partDef(name = "VFB")
    val swcSensor = partDef(name = "Sensor SWC")
    val swcControl = partDef(name = "Control SWC")
    val swcActuator = partDef(name = "Actuator SWC")

        part(name = "controlSwc", typeId = swcControl.id)
        part(name = "actuatorSwc", typeId = swcActuator.id)
    }

    // Top-level ECU composed of hardware, BSW, and application layers
    val ecu = partDef(name = "ECU") {
        part(name = "hardware", typeId = microcontroller.id)

        include(canStack)

        include(watchdogService)
        include(applicationLayer)
        include(vfb)
        include(swcSensor)
        include(swcControl)
